# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: allow-ssh
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/{{ env["project"] }}/global/networks/default
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "22"
    description: Allow SSH from anywhere

- name: allow-rdp
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/{{ env["project"] }}/global/networks/default
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "3389"
    description: Allow RDP from anywhere

- name: allow-http
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/{{ env["project"] }}/global/networks/default
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "80"
    description: Allow HTTP from anywhere

- name: allow-https
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/{{ env["project"] }}/global/networks/default
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "443"
    description: Allow HTTPS from anywhere
